title: Luis Elizondo
excerpt: Former Director, AATIP; U.S. Army Counterintelligence
quote_text: There really were religious fundamentalist extremists within the Pentagon that had a severe adversity to this topic. These are national security experts, senior members of the national intelligence community who are putting their religion above national security.

title: Luis Elizondo
excerpt: Former Director, AATIP; U.S. Army Counterintelligence
quote_text: A senior DOD official actually stopped me in the hallways in the Pentagon and told me that we were doing the devil's work.

title: Jay Stratton
excerpt: Former Director, UAP Task Force; U.S. Navy Intelligence
quote_text: I'm briefing about an advanced aerospace vehicle that has been detected on multiple sensors that's absolutely there, and you're telling me that you think these are demons and we shouldn't look at them and study them.

title: Luis Elizondo
excerpt: Former Director, AATIP; U.S. Army Counterintelligence
quote_text: The first choice was make peace with silence and sit on what is humanity's greatest secret, all the while keeping Americans in the dark.

title: Luis Elizondo
excerpt: Former Director, AATIP; U.S. Army Counterintelligence
quote_text: I couldn't, nor would I ever reveal classified information, but I knew that if I could say just enough at the unclassified level to make the media aware and our government officials aware of the reality of the UAP topic, then Jay hopefully would be able to use that momentum to go ahead and achieve the goals that we set out to achieve inside the government.

title: Luis Elizondo
excerpt: Former Director, AATIP; U.S. Army Counterintelligence
quote_text: How can any one organization, institution, religion, or government control that or censor that or gatekeep that? No one has the right to keep fundamental truths away from the American people and humanity.

title: Christopher Mellon
excerpt: Former Deputy Asst. Secretary of Defense for Intelligence
quote_text: Senator Rubio and Warner, to their great credit, put national security above their own personal political careers and took the risk of engaging publicly on this issue. When they began to engage, the Defense Department had to admit to the world that this was real and it was happening, and that immediately took the entire credibility of the issue up a huge notch.

title: Jay Stratton
excerpt: Former Director, UAP Task Force; U.S. Navy Intelligence
quote_text: There was one classified briefing that I gave to members of the House and Senate, where I took military pilots to tell them the story of their encounters with UAP. Those stories left them so rattled that they had trouble sleeping that night.

title: Luis Elizondo
excerpt: Former Director, AATIP; U.S. Army Counterintelligence
quote_text: The United States' most trusted military servicemen and women and irrefutable data from our intelligence collection systems have been observing UAP for decades.

title: Luis Elizondo
excerpt: Former Director, AATIP; U.S. Army Counterintelligence
quote_text: What we are seeing with UAP are vehicles that can make immediate right-angle turns, instantaneously accelerating and stopping on a dime at speeds up to ten times faster than the SR-71.

title: David Fravor
excerpt: Former U.S. Navy Cmdr; F/A-18 Pilot (Nimitz Incident)
quote_text: The human body can only take so much before the internal organs start to separate themselves from everything they're hooked to, which is usually bad. Even if it was a drone, it would rip the drone, the unmanned vehicle apart.

title: Luis Elizondo
excerpt: Former Director, AATIP; U.S. Army Counterintelligence
quote_text: UAP have been observed operating in space, in air and underwater, and they're moving seamlessly through each of these environments without any normal signature and without compromising performance.

title: Luis Elizondo
excerpt: Former Director, AATIP; U.S. Army Counterintelligence
quote_text: UAP seemed to be defying the natural effects of earth's gravity without any obvious means of doing so. No signs of propulsion or lift, meaning no wings, no control surfaces or ability to maneuver.

title: Ryan Graves
excerpt: Former U.S. Navy F/A-18 Pilot
quote_text: There's a particular case of one of these objects maintaining a complete stationary position inside of 120 knot winds, essentially inside of a hurricane.

title: Luis Elizondo
excerpt: Former Director, AATIP; U.S. Army Counterintelligence
quote_text: There's actually a six observable, which is not a flight characteristic, that is biological effects.

title: Luis Elizondo
excerpt: Former Director, AATIP; U.S. Army Counterintelligence
quote_text: Meanwhile, Chris Mellon and I were working with the Senate behind the scenes to craft UAP legislation that was then taken by Marco Rubio and pushed into the coronavirus relief bill.

title: John Ratcliffe
excerpt: Former Director of National Intelligence
quote_text: When President Trump signed this legislation into law, it then forced the Pentagon and the UAP task force to provide written reports to Congress, both classified and unclassified.

title: Luis Elizondo
excerpt: Former Director, AATIP; U.S. Army Counterintelligence
quote_text: As we continued to make progress, a very powerful disinformation campaign began. This effort was to destroy my reputation and credibility, full stop.

quote_text: They actually told the American people that Lue Elizondo did not work there, and that was an outright lie.

quote_text: There is something there measurable by multiple instruments, and yet it seems to move in directions that are inconsistent with what we know of physics or science, more broadly.

quote_text: There's this hidden hand that is blocking all of these actions and things I'm doing. A subversive government overriding the real government.

excerpt: Astrophysicist; Former AATIP Consultant
quote_text: The main players in the Legacy Program have long been the Central Intelligence Agency, the United States Air Force, the Department of Energy, and major defense contractors.

title: Hal Puthoff
excerpt: Physicist; Former CIA/DIA Consultant
quote_text: We have intelligence teams quickly notified if there's some UAP event that might involve a crashed vehicle or pieces from a crashed vehicle. The United States Air Force uses their own special forces, but they also coordinate with other special forces in other branches of US military.

title: Eric Davis
excerpt: Astrophysicist; Former AATIP Consultant
quote_text: They're so well organized that they basically can get to a site, gather material, whatever it is, and once it's in their possession, they have the authority to classify it, and therefore make any information about it unavailable to the public, even admission that it exists unavailable to the public.

title: Eric Davis

quote_text: They've used the security and classification language in the Atomic Energy Act to hide the Legacy crash retrieval program.

title: Hal Puthoff
excerpt: Physicist; Former CIA/DIA Consultant
quote_text: I'm aware of at least two advanced non-human species, one of which made contact with the Legacy crash retrieval program. The other of which, the bodies were recovered by the crash retrieval program in various crashes.

excerpt: Former Director, AATIP; U.S. Army Counterintelligence

title: Luis Elizondo
excerpt: Former Director, AATIP; U.S. Army Counterintelligence
quote_text: This is a topic that has a potential to create serious ontological shock to society. It's not just national security. It's psychological, it's sociological, it's theological and it's philosophical.

title: Jay Stratton
excerpt: Former Director, UAP Task Force; U.S. Navy Intelligence
quote_text: They look me in the eyes and said, 'Jay, we cannot tell you what we saw because the OSI, Air Force Office of Special Investigations, came in here, had us sign non-disclosure agreements.' 'We did see something, we did scramble on something, but we can't talk to you about it.'

title: Luis Elizondo
excerpt: Former Director, AATIP; U.S. Army Counterintelligence
quote_text: Historically, every time a military member had a UAP encounter, it was very quickly swept under the rug, and they were discouraged from talking about it.

quote_text: There was a culture of silence. I didn't talk to anybody about it, not my wife, not my colleagues, not people I knew. They just shut up. There's ramifications if you were to divulge any of this information to anyone.

quote_text: It shot a beam of light, and it hit the warhead, flew up like this, shot another beam of light down at the warhead, went like this, shot under the beam of light at the warhead, went under here, shot a beam of light at the warhead, and then flew out the way it had come in. title: Hal Puthoff
excerpt: Physicist; Former CIA/DIA Consultant
quote_text: This energy field would completely isolate the craft from the environment. So you might ask then, how does the craft actually move forward within its bubble? The craft inside the bubble has a way of altering the bubble's properties in order to change its direction of motion.

title: Hal Puthoff
excerpt: Physicist; Former CIA/DIA Consultant
quote_text: We also observe transmedium travel because the craft is moving within its own space-time, and the outside environment through which it's moving is inconsequential. This would allow a craft to go seamlessly from space through the atmosphere into the water.

title: Hal Puthoff

quote_text: Once you've realized that space and time are being engineered to be different inside the craft than they are outside the craft, then these anomalies that people report that sound completely absurd can actually make sense.

quote_text: This is technology that could replace oil, gas and coal and protect our planet for future generations.

quote_text: I would opt for making any new energy source a humanitarian, uh, issue. That it should be open. And we know how to do that. We've done that with nuclear power.

quote_text: We've got a big mess on our hands. We've got 80 years of lies and deception that quite frankly ruined a lot of people's lives, and nobody wants to take responsibility for that.

quote_text: This is not an endeavor here to go out and punish anyone. But nonetheless, we would need to know what they learnt, taxpayers paid for this. And I think offering amnesty is extremely important.

quote_text: We are still only just beginning the greatest paradigm shift in human history, the age of disclosure.
